field.label: Scope / role / group
field.help: Keycloak realm role, group or OAuth2 scope to match. Prefix with "re:" for a regular expression, e.g. re:^group_.*

field.label: Vendor ID
field.help: IANA vendor id for Vendor-Specific Attributes (e.g. 14988 MikroTik, 9 Cisco, 311 Microsoft). Leave empty for standard RADIUS attributes.

field.label: Value
field.help: Attribute value to return in the Access-Accept.
